type.markdownDescription: Field type to use to index string, number, and boolean values for pre-filtering the data. To learn more, see [filter Type](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/avs-vector-search-filter-type/)
type.description: Field type to use to index string, number, and boolean values for pre-filtering the data. Use dot notation for embedded fields.

path.markdownDescription: Path of the field to index for pre-filtering the data. Use dot notation for embedded fields.
path.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDB field naming restrictions. To learn more, see [Field Names](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/mdb-field-names).
